name: proc_access_win_lsass_susp_source_process
raw_query: any where (winlog.event_data.TargetImage:"*\\lsass.exe" and (winlog.event_data.GrantedAccess like~ ("*10", "*30", "*50", "*70", "*90", "*B0", "*D0", "*F0", "*18", "*38", "*58", "*78", "*98", "*B8", "*D8", "*F8", "*1A", "*3A", "*5A", "*7A", "*9A", "*BA", "*DA", "*FA", "*0x14C2", "*FF")) and (process.executable like~ ("*\\Temp\\*", "*\\Users\\Public\\*", "*\\PerfLogs\\*", "*\\AppData\\*", "*\\Temporary*"))) and (not (((process.executable:"*:\\Users\\*" and process.executable:"*\\AppData\\Local\\*") and (process.executable like~ ("*\\Microsoft VS Code\\Code.exe", "*\\software_reporter_tool.exe", "*\\DropboxUpdate.exe", "*\\MBAMInstallerService.exe", "*\\WebexMTA.exe", "*\\Meetings\\WebexMTAV2.exe", "*\\WebEx\\WebexHost.exe", "*\\JetBrains\\Toolbox\\bin\\jetbrains-toolbox.exe")) and winlog.event_data.GrantedAccess:"0x410") or (process.executable:"*:\\Windows\\Temp\\*" and process.executable:"*.tmp\\DropboxUpdate.exe" and (winlog.event_data.GrantedAccess like~ ("0x410", "0x1410"))) or ((process.executable:"*:\\Users\\*" and process.executable:"*\\AppData\\Local\\Temp\\*") and process.executable:"*.tmp\\DropboxUpdate.exe" and winlog.event_data.GrantedAccess:"0x1410") or ((process.executable like~ ("*:\\Program Files (x86)\\Dropbox\\*", "*:\\Program Files\\Dropbox\\*")) and process.executable:"*\\DropboxUpdate.exe" and winlog.event_data.GrantedAccess:"0x1410") or ((process.executable like~ ("*:\\Windows\\Temp\\asgard2-agent\\*", "*:\\Windows\\Temp\\asgard2-agent-sc\\*")) and (process.executable like~ ("*\\thor64.exe", "*\\thor.exe", "*\\aurora-agent-64.exe", "*\\aurora-agent.exe")) and (winlog.event_data.GrantedAccess like~ ("0x1fffff", "0x1010", "0x101010"))) or ((process.executable:"*:\\Users\\*" and process.executable:"*\\AppData\\Local\\Temp\\*" and process.executable:"*\\vs_bootstrapper_*") and winlog.event_data.GrantedAccess:"0x1410") or (process.executable:"*:\\Program Files (x86)\\Google\\Temp\\*" and process.executable:"*.tmp\\GoogleUpdate.exe" and (winlog.event_data.GrantedAccess like~ ("0x410", "0x1410"))) or (process.executable:"*:\\Users\\*" and process.executable:"*\\AppData\\Local\\Keybase\\keybase.exe" and winlog.event_data.GrantedAccess:"0x1fffff") or (process.executable:"*\\AppData\\Local\\Temp\\is-*" and process.executable:"*.tmp\\avira_system_speedup.tmp" and winlog.event_data.GrantedAccess:"0x1410") or (process.executable:"*\\AppData\\Roaming\\ViberPC\\*" and process.executable:"*\\updater.exe" and winlog.event_data.TargetImage:"*\\winlogon.exe" and winlog.event_data.GrantedAccess:"0x1fffff") or ((process.executable like~ ("*:\\Program Files\\Common Files\\Adobe\\ARM\\*", "*:\\Program Files (x86)\\Common Files\\Adobe\\ARM\\*")) and process.executable:"*\\AdobeARMHelper.exe" and winlog.event_data.GrantedAccess:"0x1410")))
